params.description: Rectangle clears from grid. Hundred Grid remains in Mode B with grid snap ON. Side handle for width=4 remains locked and exposed.
All five slots in sentence builder clear, template resets to blank state.

beats.text: You built one rectangle with that side length. Now build a different rectangle with the same side length. Drag the handle to a different height.
Drag the handle to build a rectangle with the same width but a different number of rows.

validator.description: Student built rectangle with same width=4 but different row count than previous rectangle

elements.description: Hundred Grid Mode B with grid snap ON. Student-built rectangle visible with width locked at 4 squares and student-selected height different from prior section. Side handle active.
Sentence Builder showing empty template: '___ is a multiple of ___ because ___ × ___ = ___'

beats.text: Tap Check to validate your rectangle.

validator.description: Student tapped Check, rectangle validated, dimension and area labels appear

params.description: Dimension labels (W × H) and area label appear at rectangle center.

elements.description: Hundred Grid Mode B showing validated rectangle with dimension labels (W × H) and area label visible at center. Width=4 locked, height varied from prior section.
Sentence Builder showing empty template ready for completion.

beats.text: Now complete the sentence with this new area.
Fill in all five slots to complete the sentence about this rectangle's area.

validator.description: Student filled all five slots correctly: area in slot 1, 4 in slot 2, width and height in slots 3-5 matching multiplication

beats.text: You built two different rectangles with the same side length. Both areas are multiples of 4. Every time you add a row of 4, you get the next multiple.

elements.description: Hundred Grid Mode B showing completed rectangle with dimension and area labels visible.
Sentence Builder with all five slots completed, expressing that the area is a multiple of 4.
